'''daluchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabler|cabler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabler|cabler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| daluchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dælichith|dælichith]] || [[word:dælichij|dælichij]] || [[word:dælichish|dælichish]] || [[word:dælichi|dælichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:daluluchuth|daluluchuth]] || [[word:daluluchuj|daluluchuj]] || [[word:daluluchush|daluluchush]] || [[word:daluluchu|daluluchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:daluchuth|daluchuth]] || [[word:daluchuj|daluchuj]] || [[word:daluchush|daluchush]] || [[word:daluchu|daluchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalufchuth|dalufchuth]] || [[word:dalufchuj|dalufchuj]] || [[word:dalufchush|dalufchush]] || [[word:dalufchuf|dalufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daluchuthu|daluchuthu]] || [[word:daluchuju|daluchuju]] || [[word:daluchushu|daluchushu]] || [[word:daluchuku|daluchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daluchuth|daluchuth]] || [[word:daluchuj|daluchuj]] || [[word:daluchush|daluchush]] || [[word:daluchu|daluchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daluchuthul|daluchuthul]] || [[word:daluchujul|daluchujul]] || [[word:daluchushul|daluchushul]] || [[word:daluchukul|daluchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daluchuthuthu|daluchuthuthu]] || [[word:daluchujuju|daluchujuju]] || [[word:daluchushushu|daluchushushu]] || [[word:daluchuku|daluchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daluchuthun|daluchuthun]] || [[word:daluchujun|daluchujun]] || [[word:daluchushun|daluchushun]] || [[word:daluchukun|daluchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daluchuthuoro|daluchuthuoro]] || [[word:daluchujuoro|daluchujuoro]] || [[word:daluchushuoro|daluchushuoro]] || [[word:daluchukuoro|daluchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
